briefdescription.para: LMS KAT message size in bytes.
LMS KAT signature size in bytes (H=5, LMOTS_SHA256_N32_W8)
LMS KAT public key size in bytes.
This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform LMS signature verification on the provided message using the given LMS public key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_LmsHssSignVerifyParams structure which holds the parameters for LMS signature verification.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Set the command ID based on the selected SHA type.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform HSS (Hierarchical Signature System) signature verification on the provided message using the given HSS public key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_LmsHssSignVerifyParams structure which holds the parameters for HSS signature verification.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Set the command ID based on the selected SHA type.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: Callback handler for LMS client KAT operations.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the completion flag and captures the operation status via per-invocation state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the caller's XAsu_LmsKatCbState on stack.

briefdescription.para: This function runs LMS signature verification KAT from the client side.

para.verbatim: It sends an LMS sign verify request to ASUFW using known good test vectors, busy-waits for the response, and returns the verification result.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if LMS signature verification KAT passes.

inbodydescription.para: Configure LMS signature verification parameters using KAT vectors.
Configure client parameters for synchronous operation.
Send LMS signature verification request to ASUFW.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to perform HSS Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for LMS signature verification module.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ss 01/21/26 Initial release ss 03/23/26 Added client-side LMS signature verification KAT
